mnemonics.title: BLEU Components
mnemonics.content: **B**revity **P**enalty **L**imits **E**xcessively **U**nderwhelming outputs. (Helps remember the key role of the Brevity Penalty in BLEU).

mnemonics.title: Evaluation Types
mnemonics.content: **I**ntrinsic = **I**nternal Quality. **E**xtrinsic = **E**ffective for a Task. (Uses the first letter to link the concept to its definition).

mnemonics.title: Key Ethical Concerns
mnemonics.content: **B**ias **P**rivacy **A**ccountability **M**isuse **E**nvironment. (BPAME - A fake word to remember the five key areas: Bias, Privacy, Accountability, Misuse, Environment).
